title: helictotrichon crassifolium
intro: Helictotrichon crassifolium, also known as Rough Golden Rye Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Helictotrichon crassifolium is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can be found in some commercial herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
